title: Better craftable trident
description: A simple mod that adds a straightforward crafting recipe for the trident
body:
**Better Craftable Trident** is a straightforward Minecraft modification that introduces a dedicated crafting recipe for the Trident.

This mod provides an alternative method for obtaining the Trident, which is typically acquired as a rare drop from Drowned mobs. By integrating a crafting recipe, the mod offers players a reliable path to acquire this powerful weapon.



## Recipe Overview


The recipe requires five items, utilizing materials associated with the ocean environment:

Three Prismarine Shards
Two Sticks

The recipe is structured similarly to tool crafting, with the three Prismarine Shards arranged horizontally to form the prongs and the two Sticks placed vertically below them to form the shaft.
